requirements.summary: Implement secure authentication UI with login page, session management, and protected route guards
acceptanceCriteria: Visiting any protected page without authentication redirects to login page
Incorrect credentials show a visible error message
Correct credentials start a session and redirect to the dashboard
Logout clears the session and redirects to login page
Default admin (admin / admin123) can log in successfully

file_operations.description: Create login page with username/password form, inline error display, and authentication via backend.authenticate(). On success, store session and redirect to dashboard. Include the ChickNGo logo from frontend/public/assets/generated/chickngo-logo.dim_300x80.png.
Create authentication context provider managing login state, session storage, logout function, and session timeout tracking (30-minute idle timeout as per REQ-8).
Create protected route wrapper component that checks authentication state and redirects unauthenticated users to /login.
Wrap the app with AuthContext provider and configure routing with protected routes for dashboard, add-customer, scan, customers, and offers pages.

requirements.summary: Create admin dashboard with three live summary cards (Total Customers, Today's Scans, Total Points Issued) using backend data
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard displays three cards with accurate live counts
Today's Scans reflects only scans from the current date
Total Points Issued sums all points_added values
Sidebar is visible and functional on desktop and mobile

file_operations.description: Create dashboard page displaying three summary cards with live data. Fetch customer count, today's scan count, and total points from backend methods. Use shadcn/ui Card components with the design theme (dark sidebar #1f2933, orange primary #ff6b00, white cards with shadows).

Create shared layout component with dark sidebar (#1f2933), top navbar, and navigation links (Dashboard, Add Customer, Scan QR, Customers, Offers, Logout). Include the ChickNGo logo from frontend/public/assets/generated/chickngo-logo.dim_300x80.png in the sidebar. Make fully responsive for mobile.

requirements.summary: Build Add Customer form with validation, QR code generation, and printable preview
acceptanceCriteria: Submitting with a duplicate mobile number shows an error and does not insert
A unique customer_id is generated on every new registration
A QR code PNG is displayed after successful registration
The page displays the customer's QR card preview after successful registration
All inputs are validated client-side before submission

file_operations.description: Create add customer page with form (Name, Mobile). On submit, register customer via backend, generate customer ID (CUST+timestamp+random), create QR code encoding the customer_id using qrcode.react library, and display printable QR card preview. Handle duplicate mobile validation errors from backend.
Create printable QR card component displaying customer name, mobile, QR code, and ChickNGo branding with print-friendly CSS.

requirements.summary: Build real-time QR scanner page with customer info display and points addition
acceptanceCriteria: Camera activates on page load and scans QR codes in real time
Customer name, mobile, and points are displayed after a valid scan
Clicking Add Points increments the customer's points by 10 in the database
A scan record with points_added = 10 is inserted
A visible success animation or alert confirms the points were added

file_operations.description: Create QR scanner page using the qr-code component's useQRScanner hook with facingMode 'environment'. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing. After successful scan, extract customer_id, fetch customer info from backend, display name/mobile/points, and show 'Add Points (+10)' button. On click, call backend.addPoints() with 10 points and show success animation using shadcn/ui Toast.

requirements.summary: Build Customer Management page with searchable, paginated table showing customer data and QR thumbnails
acceptanceCriteria: Table displays all customers with Name, Mobile, Points, and QR thumbnail
Search by mobile number filters the table results correctly
Pagination limits results to 10 per page with working next/previous controls
QR thumbnail links to or displays the generated QR image

file_operations.description: Create customer management page with searchable table using shadcn/ui Table component. Fetch customer list from backend, implement client-side search by mobile, pagination (10 per page), and display QR code thumbnails using qrcode.react library.

requirements.summary: Build Offers Management page with create, edit, and delete functionality
acceptanceCriteria: Admin can create a new offer with all three fields
Admin can edit an existing offer and save changes
Admin can delete an offer with a confirmation prompt
All offers are listed in a table on the page

file_operations.description: Create offers management page displaying offers table with create/edit/delete actions. Use shadcn/ui Dialog for create/edit forms (Offer Name, Required Points, Reward Description) and AlertDialog for delete confirmation. Call backend.addOffer(), backend.deleteOffer(), and fetch offers via backend.getAllOffers().

requirements.summary: Apply consistent modern SaaS dashboard visual theme across all pages
acceptanceCriteria: All pages share the same sidebar and top navbar layout
Sidebar background is #1f2933 and primary accent color is #ff6b00
Cards have white backgrounds, rounded corners, and soft shadows
Layout is usable on screens as small as 375px wide
Active sidebar item is visually highlighted

file_operations.description: Update global styles with theme colors (dark sidebar #1f2933, orange primary #ff6b00). Define CSS custom properties for theme colors and ensure mobile responsiveness down to 375px.
Configure Tailwind with custom colors (sidebar: #1f2933, primary: #ff6b00) and ensure responsive breakpoints support 375px+ screens.

Ensure DashboardLayout applies consistent theme colors, white card backgrounds with rounded corners and shadows, and highlights active navigation items. Include ChickNGo logo from frontend/public/assets/generated/chickngo-logo.dim_300x80.png.
